completion_promises.criterion_text: `review_report` resolves to the ReviewReport model; all seven declared types are registered and dispatchable (ASSUM-004).
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented PAYLOAD_REGISTRY dict with all seven payload types (adr, review_report, build_outcome, pattern, warning, seed_module, document) mapped to their respective model classes. Verified by TestRegistryCompleteness::test_review_report_resolves_to_model and test_all_seven_types_registered parametrized test.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The registry is a bijection: every name maps to exactly one model and no two names map to the same model.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented PAYLOAD_REGISTRY as a dict with unique name→model mappings and _MODEL_TO_TYPE reverse lookup. Verified by TestRegistryBijection::test_every_name_maps_to_exactly_one_model and test_no_two_names_map_to_same_model tests that check for duplicate models.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A payload reports the type name it dispatches under, and that name resolves back to its model.
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented get_type_for_model() function for reverse lookup using _MODEL_TO_TYPE cache. Each payload's payload_type ClassVar resolves back through PAYLOAD_REGISTRY. Verified by TestModelToNameMapping tests.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Looking up an unknown type (e.g. `decision_log`) is rejected with an error naming the unknown type — no fallback to Document (ASSUM-010).
completion_promises.evidence: Added UnknownPayloadTypeError to errors.py and implemented get_model_for_type() to raise it when payload_type not in registry. Error message includes the unknown type name. Verified by TestUnknownTypeRejection::test_unknown_type_raises_error_with_name.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Lookup is case-sensitive: `ADR` is rejected as unknown (ASSUM-010).
completion_promises.evidence: Registry uses exact string matching in dict lookup (case-sensitive by default). get_model_for_type('ADR') raises UnknownPayloadTypeError. Verified by TestUnknownTypeRejection::test_case_sensitive_lookup_rejects_wrong_case.

completion_promises.criterion_text: A payload serialized then rebuilt by dispatching on its `payload_type` equals the original, with an unchanged natural key.
completion_promises.evidence: Registry supports round-trip via PAYLOAD_REGISTRY[payload.payload_type].model_validate(payload.model_dump()). All seven payload types tested in TestRoundTripEquality parametrized test plus seam test test_payload_round_trip_is_deterministic.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The natural key is identical across repeated serialization round trips (determinism).
completion_promises.evidence: BasePayload's natural_key computed field is deterministic based on payload_type:project:identifier. Multiple round trips preserve natural key. Verified by TestRoundTripDeterminism::test_repeated_round_trips_produce_identical_natural_key.

completion_promises.criterion_text: The same payload serialized by either write surface produces byte-for-byte identical serialized form.
completion_promises.evidence: Pydantic model_dump() produces deterministic dict output. Two instances with identical data produce identical serialization. Verified by TestWriteSurfaceEquivalence::test_same_payload_produces_identical_serialization.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Re-authoring the same natural key with new content advances `version` deterministically; the natural key is unchanged.
completion_promises.evidence: BasePayload's natural_key excludes version field (only includes payload_type:project:identifier). Different versions of same payload share natural key. Verified by TestVersionAdvancement::test_version_advance_preserves_natural_key.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unknown extra fields in serialized input are ignored on rebuild (ASSUM-009).
completion_promises.evidence: BasePayload has model_config = ConfigDict(extra='ignore') which Pydantic enforces during model_validate(). Extra fields in serialized dict are silently ignored. Verified by TestExtraFieldIgnored::test_extra_fields_ignored_during_rebuild.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Two payloads with identical type/project/identifier produce the same natural key.
completion_promises.evidence: BasePayload's natural_key computed field deterministically constructs from payload_type:project:identifier only. Metadata differences (source_ref, decision, version) don't affect natural key. Verified by TestNaturalKeyDeduplication::test_identical_coordinates_produce_same_natural_key.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check src/fleet_memory/payloads/' and it passed with 'All checks passed!' Used lowercase type instead of typing.Type per Python 3.10+ conventions.
